title: Oil tanker explodes on Kentucky highway
description: Dashcam footage has captured the moment an oil tanker exploded on a highway in Newport, Kentucky. Local reports said the blast was caused by a crash between the fuel tanker and a car. Two children and a woman who were in the car were taken to hospital with minor injuries and the tanker driver was treated on the scene, officials said. #explosion #truck #car #Kentucky #worldnews

description: Prince Andrew is facing pressure from Buckingham Palace to voluntarily remove himself from the royal line of succession, where he currently sits eighth in line. Royal biographer Tom Bower claims a palace representative travelled to Sandringham to present Andrew with an offer to step aside, which could avoid a legislative process requiring support from all 15 Commonwealth realms. title: Fuel crisis threatens Australian food supply | 7NEWS
description: Australian farmers are warning of potential food shortages and rationing due to severe petrol and diesel supply issues affecting agricultural operations. The fuel crisis is threatening crop harvests, with farmers unable to access fuel during crucial harvesting periods and trucking fleets at risk of being grounded. The federal government has released 750 million litres of petrol from Australian reserves in response to the crisis.
